network_description: A modular Layer 1 blockchain and the first decentralized AI operating system. designed to provide infinitely scalable data availability and storage for high-performance on-chain AI.
A highly anticipated 2026 consumer-focused blockchain that leverages the ZK-Stack to provide a seamless "invisible" user experience by abstracting away the complexities of gas fees and bridging.
Acala is a decentralized finance network and liquidity hub built on Polkadot that provides a suite of financial applications including a multi collateralized stablecoin and a trustless exchange.
A high-performance decentralized derivatives exchange operating on a custom Layer 2 rollup that recently executed a massive supply burn to pivot toward a deflationary staking model.
A decentralized peer-to-peer cloud computing marketplace that allows users to lease or provide underutilized GPU and CPU power. primarily catering to the growing demand for AI training and inference.

Aleo is a decentralized blockchain platform that uses zero-knowledge proofs to provide a private and scalable environment for building applications. It enables developers to create decentralized services that protect user privacy while maintaining the security of a public ledger.

This Layer 2 "Optimium" on Ethereum provides a privacy-enhancing execution environment that combines the speed of the Aleph Zero ecosystem with seamless compatibility for standard Ethereum developer tools.
carbon-negative. Pure Proof-of-Stake (PPoS) blockchain known for its instant transaction finality. high security. and recent push toward a fully decentralized peer-to-peer networking architecture.

Alpen is a Bitcoin Layer 2 network that uses zero knowledge rollups to provide a programmable and scalable financial ecosystem. It enables EVM compatible smart contracts and decentralized applications such as lending or stablecoins while inheriting Bitcoins security. Through its unique bridge architecture and proof verification the platform allows for trust minimized transactions without the need for wrapped tokens.

Altair serves as a canary network for Centrifuge on Kusama designed to test and bridge real-world assets into the decentralized finance ecosystem. It allows users to tokenize assets and use them as collateral to access liquidity within a high speed and experimental environment.

Andromeda is an all in one blockchain operating system designed to simplify the development and deployment of decentralized applications. It features a decentralized operating system called aOS which provides a simplified user experience for building and interacting with complex on chain projects.
A specialized Layer 3 blockchain built on Arbitrum Orbit that serves as the dedicated infrastructure for the ApeCoin ecosystem by using $APE as its native gas token.
An EVM-compatible Layer 2 execution environment within the Apex Fusion tri-chain ecosystem. designed to bridge the gap between UTXO-based chains like Cardano and the Ethereum-based DeFi landscape.

Aptos is a Layer 1 blockchain designed for scalability and safety using the Move programming language. It focuses on high throughput and low latency to support mainstream decentralized application adoption.

Arbitrum Nova is a Layer 2 scaling solution built using AnyTrust technology to provide low cost and high throughput transactions for social applications and gaming. It utilizes a Data Availability Committee to reduce fees while maintaining Ethereum security through optimistic rollups.
The leading Ethereum Layer 2 by total value locked that has recently deployed "Stylus" to allow developers to write smart contracts in efficient languages like Rust and C++.

Arbitrum Orbit is a permissionless framework for launching customizable Layer 2 or Layer 3 blockchains using the Nitro tech stack. It allows developers to tailor chain components like gas tokens and governance while benefiting from Ethereum security and high throughput.
Arc is a high performance modular blockchain designed to support decentralized artificial intelligence through scalable data availability and storage solutions.

Arweave is a decentralized storage network that provides permanent data hosting through a blockweave structure and proof of access consensus. It enables users to store information indefinitely with a one-time fee to ensure long-term data preservation.
Polkadot Asset Hub serves as the central system parachain for issuing and managing native assets and NFTs across the entire Polkadot multichain ecosystem.
A versatile network within the Polkadot ecosystem that supports both Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) and WebAssembly (WASM) smart contracts to facilitate a multi-chain future.
An Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) created by the NEAR Protocol team that allows developers to run their Ethereum applications on a high-throughput and scalable platform with low transaction costs.
The default smart contract instance on the Avalanche network that enables the seamless deployment of Ethereum-compatible decentralized applications with near-instant transaction finality.

The P-Chain is the metadata blockchain on Avalanche that coordinates validators and tracks active subnets. It manages the staking process and enables the creation of new subnets and blockchains within the ecosystem.

Avalanche X Chain is the Exchange Chain of the Avalanche network designed for creating and trading digital assets with high throughput and fast finality. It uses the Avalanche consensus protocol to ensure secure and efficient transactions across the ecosystem.

Aventus is an enterprise grade Layer 2 blockchain built on Polkadot that focuses on scalability and interoperability. It provides businesses with a secure environment to build and scale decentralized applications while maintaining high transaction speeds and low costs.
A decentralized interoperability network that connects different blockchain ecosystems to allow for secure cross-chain communication and asset transfers through a single universal protocol.

B3 is a gaming focused Layer 2 blockchain built on Base that utilizes the OP Stack to provide a seamless and horizontal scaling solution for developers and gamers. The network aims to simplify the onboarding process by eliminating the need for manual bridging or network switching.

A revolutionary security protocol that allows Bitcoin holders to stake their native $BTC to provide economic security for Proof-of-Stake blockchains without ever moving their assets off the Bitcoin network.
An Ethereum Layer 2 incubated by Coinbase that is spending 2026 focusing on "customer-centric" infrastructure to onboard millions of retail users through seamless smart wallet integrations.

Basilisk is a liquidity protocol and parachain built on the Kusama network that aims to enable friction-less asset bootstrapping. It functions as a modular decentralized exchange designed to provide liquid markets for nascent crypto projects through automated market making and auction mechanisms.
An innovative Layer 1 blockchain built on the Cosmos SDK that utilizes a "Proof-of-Liquidity" consensus mechanism and a tri-token system to align validator incentives with ecosystem liquidity.

Bifrost Network is a modular Layer 1 public blockchain built on the Substrate framework and fully compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine. It operates as a cross chain infrastructure platform designed to solve fragmentation and interoperability challenges across Web3 ecosystems through its unique Cross Chain Communication Protocol. The network enables seamless interaction between diverse blockchains including EVM compatible chains and the Bitcoin network while providing high performance speeds and low transaction costs. By serving as a decentralized middleware and financial hub Bifrost empowers developers to build multichain applications that leverage liquidity and assets from multiple networks simultaneously.

Binance Beacon Chain is a high performance blockchain that serves as the staking and governance layer for the Binance ecosystem. It facilitates fast peer to peer trading through a decentralized exchange while supporting secure asset issuance and management.

A high-throughput smart contract platform that has recently moved toward a dual-client strategy to achieve 20000 transactions per second and sub-second finality while maintaining full Ethereum compatibility.
The world’s premier decentralized store of value which has recently seen a surge in utility through the Runes protocol and institutional treasury adoption.
A peer-to-peer electronic cash system that is undergoing a major 2026 upgrade to "CashVM" which re-enables full smart contract functionality and reduces block times to two minutes.

Now rebranded and primarily known as eCash ($XEC) this chain focuses on being a high-speed transactional currency that incorporates a Proof-of-Stake consensus layer called Avalanche for instant finality.
An enterprise-focused blockchain currently deploying "Teranode" architecture to support over one million transactions per second for the emerging AI agentic economy.

Bitlayer is a Bitcoin Layer 2 scaling solution that utilizes the BitVM paradigm to enable Ethereum-like programmability and smart contract functionality on the Bitcoin network. It employs a hybrid rollup architecture with zero-knowledge and optimistic proofs to achieve high throughput and low fees while inheriting the underlying security of Bitcoin.

A decentralized machine learning network that uses a blockchain based protocol to facilitate a distributed marketplace for artificial intelligence. It enables miners to contribute computational power and machine learning models while being rewarded in TAO tokens for their performance and accuracy.
An optimistic rollup that differentiates itself by providing native yield on bridged ETH and stablecoins and is currently rolling out its "Phase 2" full-stack mobile ecosystem.
Short for "Build on Bitcoin" this hybrid Layer 2 connects the liquidity of Bitcoin with the programmability of Ethereum through the recent activation of BitVM-based finality.
An Ethereum-equivalent Layer 2 built on top of Bitcoin that uses a unique "Spiderchain" multi-sig network to bring DeFi and smart contracts to the native $BTC ecosystem.
Built on Bitcoin is a blockchain network that leverages the security and infrastructure of the Bitcoin ecosystem to enable decentralized applications and smart contract functionality.

Bytom is an open source blockchain platform designed to bridge the digital and physical worlds by facilitating the registration and exchange of diverse assets. It utilizes a proof of work consensus mechanism and a three layer architecture to enable secure asset management and interoperability across different networks.
A specialized Layer 1 blockchain tailored for the global travel industry that tokenizes real-world travel assets and recently completed a major flight-tracking proof of concept.
A permissionless general-purpose blockchain designed to support "Free Public Infrastructure" by providing built-in decentralized exchanges and lending markets without protocol fees.
An institutional-grade interoperability network that connects regulated financial systems and is currently being used by the DTCC to tokenize U.S. Treasuries in 2026.
A research-driven. third-generation Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchain that prioritizes security and sustainability through its unique dual-layer architecture and formal verification methods.
Celestia operates as the industry-standard modular data availability network that allows other blockchains to scale by offloading their transaction data storage requirements.
A mobile-first blockchain that has successfully transitioned into an Ethereum Layer 2 to leverage the OP Stack while maintaining its mission of global financial inclusion.
Central Banks are regulated government bodies that handlle issuance of Fiat currencies like USD, EUR, SGD.
Stock exchange like Nasdaq that trade and manage these equities.
A leading real-world asset (RWA) platform that provides the infrastructure for on-chain asset management and recently saw a massive liquidity influx following its 2026 Upbit listing.
The foundational blockchain for the "SportFi" ecosystem which is currently executing a 2026 World Cup roadmap featuring omnichain fan tokens and a $CHZ buyback program.
The original blockchain for Chiliz that facilitates fan engagement and rewards through Fan Tokens for sports and entertainment organizations.
Citrea is the first Zero-Knowledge (ZK) rollup built on Bitcoin and designed to scale the network and enable smart contracts (EVM compatibility) without changing Bitcoin consensus rules.
A decentralized data storage engine within the Nimbus ecosystem designed to provide censorship-resistant and durable storage specifically for high-volume blockchain applications.

Concordium is the Layer-1 blockchain built for a new era of digital trust. With mandatory privacy-preserving identity verification built into its consensus layer by utilizing zero-knowledge proof technology. Concordium also enables Protocol-level tokens that eliminate smart contract risks by being issued directly at the consensus layer and with built-in features that provide the infrastructure for compliance-ready use cases.

A Turing-complete Layer 1 blockchain that utilizes the "Satoshi Plus" consensus mechanism to combine Bitcoin’s mining hash rate with the Ethereum Virtual Machine for enhanced security and scalability.

Corn is an Ethereum Layer 2 network that integrates Bitcoin into its ecosystem through the use of BTCN as gas. It utilizes a unique Crop Circle mechanism to align incentives between users dApps and token holders while enhancing the utility of both Bitcoin and Ethereum assets.
he central service provider and economic heart of the Cosmos network that enables independent blockchains to communicate and exchange assets through the Inter-Blockchain Communication (IBC) protocol.

The leading EVM-compatible chain for the Crypto.com ecosystem which has recently upgraded to "BlockSTM" technology to support up to 60000 transactions per second for high-speed DeFi and retail payments.

Crust Shadow is a decentralized storage network built on the Polkadot Substrate framework that operates as a Kusama parachain. It implements an incentive layer for storage protocols like IPFS to provide secure and scalable cloud solutions for the Web3 ecosystem. The native CSM token facilitates transaction fees and resource purchases while supporting on-chain governance and network value.
A veteran privacy-centric payments network that is currently integrating Zcashs "Orchard" shielded pool technology into its 2026 Evolution platform upgrade to offer compliant anonymity features.

DigiByte is an open-source UTXO blockchain launched in 2014 as a Bitcoin fork focused on speed and security. It utilizes a unique three-layer architecture and five distinct mining algorithms to enhance decentralization and prevent network attacks. The platform supports smart contracts and digital assets while maintaining fast 15-second block times and minimal transaction fees. A community-driven project with no central authority it features a fixed supply of 21 billion tokens to be fully mined by 2035.
The worlds most recognizable meme-based cryptocurrency which maintains a robust share of the proof-of-work market and continues to evolve through community-driven scaling proposals.

A high-performance application-specific blockchain built on the Cosmos SDK that has captured nearly 40% of the decentralized perpetuals market by offering gas-free trading and professional-grade order books.

Dymension is a modular blockchain network designed to power RollApps through its hub and spoke architecture. It facilitates the deployment of easily scalable app-specific blockchains by utilizing a standardized settlement layer.
eCash utilizes a unique hybrid consensus model combining proof of work with Avalanche technology to deliver instant transaction finality for a peer-to-peer electronic cash system.
EdgeX is a high performance decentralized exchange infrastructure built on a modular Layer 2 blockchain to provide secure and scalable trading solutions.

Elastos is a blockchain-powered internet version. Its recent breakthrough is the introduction of BeL2. a Layer 2 solution leveraging SmartWeb technology to revolutionize Bitcoin transactions. Elastos is using SmartWeb technology to build the Bitcoin second-layer network BeL2 which extends the efficiency and scalability of the Bitcoin network through smart contracts. This endeavor will enable Bitcoin to power a smart economy and effectively release the liquidity of hundreds of billions of dollars in staked Bitcoin assets.

Energy Web is a global nonprofit organization using open source decentralized technologies to accelerate the energy transition. Its blockchain platform enables market participants to deploy decentralized applications that coordinate energy assets and improve grid flexibility.

A high-throughput smart contract platform known for its Delegated Proof-of-Stake (DPoS) model and feeless transaction structure that recently rebranded its core protocol to "Antelope" to emphasize community independence.
Ethereal is the primary execution environment for Ethereum as it executes its 2026 roadmap focused on real-time ZK-proof verification and massive rollup data capacity.
The worlds largest programmable blockchain currently undergoing the "Glamsterdam" upgrade to implement parallel processing and enshrined proposer-builder separation for better scaling.
The original immutable version of the Ethereum blockchain that adheres to the "Code is Law" philosophy and remains a top choice for Proof-of-Work miners seeking a programmable smart contract layer.
Ethereum PoW persists as a niche proof-of-work fork following the original Merge that maintains a dedicated mining community and legacy application support.
Etherlink operates as a non-custodial Layer 2 solution powered by Tezos smart rollups that recently achieved sub-50ms transaction confirmations for real-time decentralized applications.
Evmos functions as a high-throughput Cosmos SDK blockchain that provides full EVM compatibility to allow Ethereum developers to access the Inter-Blockchain Communication protocol.
Fantom has largely migrated its core ecosystem to the new Sonic network technology to achieve significantly higher transaction speeds and improved storage efficiency for DeFi users.
Fastex Bahamut utilizes a unique Proof of Stake and Activity consensus mechanism that rewards validators based on the actual smart contract usage and gas generated by their nodes.
Fetch.ai is an open access decentralized machine learning network with a crypto economy. It enables autonomous agents to perform tasks and exchange data across various industries.
Filecoin has transitioned from a simple storage network into a programmable decentralized cloud through its FVM upgrade to support AI data pipelines and automated retrievals.
Flare operates as a data-centric blockchain that integrates enshrined oracles to provide smart contracts with trustless access to high-integrity information from other chains and the internet.

Flow EVM represents a major network evolution that allows Ethereum-based decentralized applications to run seamlessly on Flow’s high-performance architecture while maintaining native consumer-scale benefits.

Fraxtal is a modular Layer 2 blockchain built by the Frax Finance team using the OP Stack. It functions as an Ethereum rollup designed to provide a highly scalable environment for decentralized finance and smart contract applications.

Fusion is an interoperability blockchain and financial platform designed to connect different networks and organizations through smart contracts. The project uses a unique Hierarchical Hybrid Consensus Mechanism and Distributed Control Rights Management to enable seamless cross-chain asset transfers and complex financial services. Managed by the Fusion Foundation and founded by Dejun Qian the network aims to create an inclusive ecosystem for the digital exchange of value using its native FSN token for gas and transactions.

Gas is a modular Layer 2 blockchain built on top of Ethereum that focuses on providing high throughput and low latency for decentralized applications. It utilizes ZK-rollups to ensure security and scalability while maintaining compatibility with the Ethereum Virtual Machine.

Genshiro is a decentralized finance platform on the Kusama blockchain serving as the canary network for Equilibrium. It provides an interoperable hub for lending margin trading and synthetic assets while enabling cross chain functionality. Users utilize the GENS token for governance transaction fees and liquidity rewards within its ecosystem.
Gnosis Chain serves as a highly decentralized Ethereum sidechain that has become a primary hub for prediction markets and community-governed infrastructure projects.
GUNZ is a specialized Avalanche subnet designed specifically for AAA gaming economies that supports millions of daily in-game transactions with zero downtime.

GUNZ is a Layer 1 blockchain ecosystem developed by Gunzilla Games as an Avalanche Subnet to power AAA Web3 gaming. It features a play to own model where players can trade in game items as NFTs via the native GUN token. The network supports high performance titles like Off The Grid and provides developers with SDKs for seamless blockchain integration.

GXChain is a decentralized data exchange ecosystem designed to provide a secure and efficient platform for global data trading. It utilizes a delegated proof of stake consensus mechanism to support high performance and scalability for various applications.

HAQQ Network is a Shariah compliant Proof of Stake blockchain built with the Cosmos SDK and fully compatible with Ethereum. It powers the Islamic Coin utility token to provide ethical financial services like staking and DeFi while directing ten percent of new issuance to the Evergreen DAO for charitable projects. This decentralized system enables high throughput and interoperability with the broader Cosmos and Ethereum ecosystems through IBC and EVM support.

HashKey Chain is an Ethereum Layer 2 network built with the ZK Stack to provide high performance and scalability within the HashKey Group ecosystem. It offers developers a secure and cost effective environment for building decentralized applications while leveraging institutional grade infrastructure.
Hedera uses hashgraph consensus to provide a highly secure and sustainable network for enterprise use cases including a recently patented national road-use charging system.

Hedera EVM is an Ethereum Virtual Machine compatible execution environment built on the Hedera network. It enables developers to deploy and run Solidity smart contracts with the speed and security of the Hashgraph consensus algorithm.

The Helium Network is a decentralized blockchain-powered wireless infrastructure designed to enable global connectivity for the Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Unlike traditional networks built and controlled by centralized corporations. Helium leverages blockchain technology and community incentives to create an open secure and scalable solution for connecting smart devices worldwide.

Hemi is a modular Layer 2 network built on Bitcoin and Ethereum that integrates the security of Bitcoin with the programmability of Ethereum through the Hemi Virtual Machine. It features the Proof-of-Proof consensus mechanism to enable secure cross-chain interoperability and scaling for decentralized applications.

Horizen is a zero knowledge enabled blockchain network that provides a scalable and secure ecosystem for decentralized applications and sidechains. It utilizes a unique sidechain protocol called Zendoo to allow developers to build custom blockchains while maintaining decentralization through a distributed node system.
HT Chain has transitioned into a more decentralized governance model under HTX DAO while maintaining its role as the primary ecosystem for HTX exchange users.

Humanity Protocol establishes a decentralized identity layer using palm-vein recognition technology to verify unique human users while protecting personal biometric data through zero-knowledge proofs.

HydraDX is a decentralized multi asset liquidity protocol built on Polkadot that enables efficient and frictionless trading through a single omnipool design. The network utilizes a substrate based architecture to provide high throughput and cross chain interoperability for various crypto assets.

HyperEVM operates as the Ethereum-compatible execution layer for the Hyperliquid network to enable developers to build decentralized applications that interact with a high-performance native order book.

Hyperliquid is a decentralized perpetual exchange built on its own high performance Layer 1 blockchain. It utilizes a proof of stake consensus mechanism and the Tendermint SDK to provide a fast and scalable trading experience for decentralized finance users.
An interoperable blockchain network designed to connect diverse communities and allow independent blockchains to exchange data and value through a decentralized hub.
Immutable zkEVM has successfully merged with the original Immutable X infrastructure to create a single unified environment for high-scale Web3 gaming and gas-free NFT trading.
Initia functions as a modular orchestration layer that allows developers to launch interconnected application-specific rollups within a unified economic security framework.
Injective remains a leading finance-optimized Layer 1 that recently upgraded its mainnet with dynamic gas fees and enhanced real-time Ethereum Virtual Machine capabilities.
A DeFi-focused Layer 2 blockchain launched by the Kraken exchange that leverages the OP Stack to provide institutional-grade liquidity and a simplified user experience for on-chain trading.

Interlay is a decentralized network and modular layer between Bitcoin and the multi-chain ecosystem designed to unlock financial use cases for BTC. It features a trustless bridge that allows users to create iBTC a one-to-one Bitcoin-backed asset for use in decentralized finance across various blockchains like Polkadot and Ethereum. The platform operates as a Polkadot parachain and provides a comprehensive DeFi hub with capabilities for swapping lending and borrowing while maintaining high security and transparency.

A decentralized cloud computing platform designed to host smart contracts and web-scale applications directly on the public internet. It aims to replace traditional IT stacks by providing a secure and scalable environment for building tamperproof software and decentralized services.

IOST is a high-throughput smart contract platform designed for scalability and speed through its proof-of-believability consensus mechanism. It aims to provide the infrastructure for a decentralized economy by offering a secure and efficient environment for developers to build decentralized applications.
IOTA L1 utilizes the newly implemented Rebased protocol to support over 50000 transactions per second with sub-second finality for global enterprise and trade applications.
IOTA EVM provides a fully compatible smart contract environment that anchors to the Tangle to allow Ethereum developers to leverage IOTA’s feeless data transport layer.
IoTeX continues to lead the DePIN sector by integrating real-world device data with artificial intelligence while hardening its bridge security following recent infrastructure upgrades.

Juno is a decentralized interoperable network for smart contracts that serves as a sovereign layer 1 ecosystem within the Cosmos network. It enables developers to create and deploy scalable dApps using CosmWasm while providing a secure environment for cross-chain automation.

A proof of work blockchain that combines a layer 1 public chain with a layer 2 private chain to provide high throughput and scalability for decentralized applications and enterprise solutions using the Pact smart contract language.
Kaia represents the successful strategic merger of the Klaytn and Finschia blockchains to form a dominant Web3 ecosystem across the Asian market.

Kaspa is a decentralized and open-source Layer 1 blockchain that utilizes a Proof of Work consensus mechanism and a blockDAG structure. This architecture allows for rapid block generation and near-instant transaction finality while maintaining high security and scalability.
The native decentralized exchange for the Ronin Network that facilitates near-instant and low-cost asset swaps for the world’s largest Web3 gaming communities.
KAVA serves as a hybrid Layer 1 combining the interoperability of Cosmos with the development flexibility of Ethereum under a newly established zero-inflation tokenomic model.

Kintsugi is a public testnet for the Ethereum Merge designed to allow developers and validators to test the transition from proof of work to proof of stake in a live environment. It serves as a critical sandbox for identifying bugs and ensuring network stability before the final mainnet upgrade.

Klaytn is an enterprise grade public blockchain platform developed by South Korean internet giant Kakao that focuses on the metaverse and gaming. It utilizes a hybrid design combining public and private blockchain features with an optimized Istanbul Byzantine Fault Tolerance consensus mechanism to achieve one second block finality and high transaction throughput. The network features a unique tiered architecture with consensus nodes and proxy nodes that allow businesses to operate customized service chains while maintaining high performance and scalability.

A decentralized ecosystem and Layer 1 blockchain built on Cosmos that focuses on sustainable fintech solutions and community-governed protocols. It provides institutional-grade tools for retail users through a suite of interoperable applications designed to create a fair and sustainable yield environment.
Kusama maintains its status as the primary experimental canary network for Polkadot where developers deploy and test high-risk governance and parachain innovations.
LaChain operates as a localized blockchain consortium specifically designed to facilitate stablecoin settlements and decentralized identity solutions across the Latin American region.

Lens is a decentralized social Layer 2 blockchain built on the ZK stack for SocialFi applications. It features modular social primitives and user ownership of data while utilizing GHO as the native gas token for low cost transactions. The network leverages Avail for data availability and ZKsync technology to provide a scalable environment for developers to build interoperable social media platforms.
A zkEVM network developed by Consensys that is transitioning in 2026 to a "Type 1" rollup for perfect Ethereum bytecode compatibility and significantly higher transaction throughput.
A veteran blockchain project that has successfully completed its migration to an Ethereum Layer 2 using the OP Stack to focus on real-world assets and decentralized physical infrastructure.
Litecoin is expanding its utility beyond simple payments through the launch of the LitVM testnet which introduces ZK-powered smart contracts to the network.
Lumia functions as a liquidity-focused Layer 2 network designed to aggregate deep market depth from centralized and decentralized sources for on-chain traders.
Manta Pacific functions as a modular Layer 2 utilizing Celestia for data availability to achieve significantly lower transaction costs for users.
Mantle operates as a high-performance distribution layer that bridges centralized exchange liquidity with decentralized finance through its unique modular data availability design.
MANTRA functions as a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain designed specifically for the compliant issuance and trading of tokenized real-world assets like real estate and bonds.
MegaETH is a high-performance real-time Layer 2 capable of processing 100000 transactions per second through specialized node architecture and parallel execution.

Memento (formerly known as the Domani Protocol) is a decentralized finance (DeFi) project focused on asset management and the tokenization of Real World Assets (RWA). The project aims to bridge traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) by providing institutional-grade infrastructure. It allows users ranging from individuals to fund managers to create and manage XTF funds. These are non-custodial tokenized portfolios (essentially on-chain ETFs) that can hold a variety of ERC-20 tokens.

Memento Chain is a high performance blockchain network designed for efficient data storage and decentralized applications. It provides a scalable infrastructure to support seamless on chain transactions and secure digital asset management.

Merlin Chain is a native Bitcoin Layer 2 solution that integrates ZK rollup technology decentralized oracles and on-chain fraud proof modules to enhance Bitcoin network scalability and security. It supports various Bitcoin protocols while aiming to empower decentralized applications and assets within the Bitcoin ecosystem.

Metal L2 is a high-performance Layer 2 scaling solution built on the OP Stack that integrates with the Antelope framework to provide horizontal scalability and zero-fee transactions for decentralized applications and digital assets.
Metis has successfully pivoted its Layer 2 architecture to focus on decentralized artificial intelligence inference and high-throughput execution for on-chain agents.

A Bitcoin economic layer that uses a Proof of HODL consensus mechanism to enable users to earn yield while securing the network. It serves as a permissionless platform designed to scale the Bitcoin ecosystem through smart contract functionality and decentralized applications.

Midnight is a next-generation privacy-focused blockchain developed by Input Output Global. It is designed as a sidechain/partner-chain to Cardano which specializing in data protection and selective disclosure.

Mina Protocol is a lightweight proof of stake blockchain that uses zero knowledge proofs to maintain a constant size of 22 kilobytes. It enables users to verify the entire state of the network from any device without relying on third party intermediaries. This design facilitates high scalability and privacy through zero knowledge smart contracts known as zkApps.

Mind Network is pioneering the Zero Trust Internet Transfer Protocol (HTTPZ) enabling quantum-resistant and fully encrypted internet data as well as AI computation through Fully Homomorphic Encryption. Mind Network serves as the trust and security foundation for the AI-Agent economy by enabling AI agents to operate autonomously and collaboratively in a decentralized Web3 ecosystem. Through Fully Homomorphic Encryption FHE that ensures data privacy secure transactions and decentralized consensus which allow AI agents to manage assets and execute smart contracts as well as  interact seamlessly without compromising security.

Mind Network is a decentralized Zero Trust data layer that uses Fully Homomorphic Encryption and Stealth Address Protocols to secure data storage and computation across AI and Proof of Stake networks.
Mint is an Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain designed for the NFT ecosystem to facilitate innovation and provide low gas fees for creators and developers.
Mirasmanda focuses on enterprise-grade supply chain transparency and asset tracking by leveraging decentralized ledger technology to reduce manual errors in global logistics.

Mixin is a decentralized peer-to-peer network and wallet platform designed for fast digital asset transactions with high throughput. It uses BFT-DAG technology to achieve high scalability and zero fees while supporting multiple blockchains for cross-chain transfers. The network suffered a major security breach in September 2023 involving a 200 million dollar loss from its cloud service provider database.

Mode is an Ethereum Layer 2 network designed to encourage a cooperative on-chain economy through sequencer fee sharing and referral rewards. It uses the OP Stack to provide a scalable environment for developers and users to build and grow the decentralized finance ecosystem.
Monad represents a new generation of ultra-high-speed blockchains that utilize parallel execution to achieve massive transaction throughput while remaining fully compatible with Ethereum.

Monero is a privacy-focused layer 1 blockchain that provides total anonymity for users and transactions by default. It utilizes advanced cryptographic technologies such as ring signatures stealth addresses and RingCT to hide the sender recipient and transaction amount. Launched in 2014 the network uses the RandomX proof-of-work consensus algorithm which is designed to be resistant to specialized ASIC mining hardware.
Moonbeam serves as a primary parachain on Polkadot that offers an Ethereum-compatible environment for cross-chain applications to interact with the entire Polkadot ecosystem.
Moonriver serves as the community-led parachain on Kusama that provides an easy-to-use development environment for early-stage decentralized applications entering the Polkadot ecosystem.
Morph serves as a consumer-centric rollup combining optimistic and zero-knowledge technologies to facilitate everyday global payments and decentralized finance.

MultiversX is a highly scalable and secure blockchain platform designed for the metaverse and decentralized finance. It utilizes an innovative Adaptive State Sharding mechanism and a Secure Proof of Stake consensus to deliver fast transactions with low costs.
Nahmii provides an institutional-grade scaling protocol featuring instant finality and predictable fees designed for commercial-scale blockchain applications.
NEAR Protocol has established itself as the primary home for user-owned artificial intelligence by integrating private cross-chain intents and advanced sharding technology.

Nebulas describes itself as an autonomous metanet which focuses on on-chain data interactions and collaboration. Its hyper-mapped structural metadata can reportedly handle increasingly complex on-chain data and describe these interactions.
NEM continues to maintain its Smart Asset Blockchain architecture for enterprise data management while focusing on niche industrial use cases amid decreasing retail exchange liquidity.
An open source blockchain platform that enables developers to automate and optimize the smart economy through digital assets and identities.
NERO Chain functions as an emerging blockchain infrastructure designed to optimize the performance and security of decentralized physical infrastructure and gaming ecosystems.

NeuroWeb is a decentralized AI blockchain designed to incentivize knowledge creation and sharing through knowledge mining. It functions as a modular Layer 1 innovation hub for the OriginTrail Decentralized Knowledge Graph and is secured by the Polkadot network. The ecosystem uses the NEURO utility token to reward contributions and fuel a cross-chain knowledge economy compatible with both Ethereum and Polkadot.
Neutron provides a secure cross-chain smart contract platform within the Cosmos ecosystem that allows developers to launch applications with interchain queries and transactions.

Nillion is a decentralized network for secure computation and data privacy that uses Nil Message Compute to protect sensitive information without relying on traditional encryption. It enables developers to build private and scalable applications by distributing data across a network of nodes to ensure high security and confidentiality.
Noble has transitioned from a Cosmos appchain to a standalone EVM Layer 1 to serve as a purpose-built liquidity hub for institutional stablecoin issuance.
Nomina functions as a unified perpetual futures trading platform that has recently rebranded from Omni Network to focus on institutional-grade decentralized derivatives.

Nym is a decentralized privacy infrastructure project that utilizes a multi layered mixnet to protect network traffic and metadata from surveillance. It employs Sphinx packet encryption and zero knowledge credentials to enable anonymous communication and secure digital identities across various applications. The native NYM token incentivizes a global network of independent node operators while powering an economic model focused on sustainability and privacy preservation.

Oasis is a privacy focused Layer 1 blockchain network designed for open finance and a responsible data economy. It features a unique architecture that separates consensus from computation to enable high scalability and secure data processing.
Oasys operates as a gaming-optimized blockchain featuring a multi-layered architecture that offers zero gas fees for players and high-speed execution for developers.

Omni is a modular Layer 1 blockchain and the first decentralized AI operating system designed to provide infinitely scalable data availability and storage for high-performance on-chain AI. The protocol integrates modular storage with verifiable inference and scalable execution to enable trustless and cost-efficient AI applications. Its architecture separates consensus from execution to achieve high throughput and sub-second finality while supporting various dApps across DeFi and gaming.

Ontology is a high-performance open-source blockchain specializing in digital identity and data. It provides a decentralized infrastructure that allows businesses to build blockchain solutions with customizable features while ensuring data security and privacy.
Optimism acts as the foundational governance and infrastructure layer for the Superchain ecosystem connecting multiple interoperable Layer 2 networks.
Osmosis remains the primary liquidity hub for the interchain ecosystem by providing advanced automated market maker features and seamless cross-chain asset swaps.

0G Labs is a modular Layer 1 blockchain and decentralized AI operating system designed for high performance on chain AI. It provides infinitely scalable data availability and storage to handle massive datasets and computational needs for artificial intelligence applications.
Pai Network is a decentralized AI operating system and modular Layer 1 blockchain designed to provide infinitely scalable data availability and storage for high performance on chain AI applications.

Payy Network is a blockchain protocol focused on simplifying digital payments and financial transactions through a user friendly infrastructure. It aims to bridge the gap between traditional finance and decentralized systems by providing fast and secure payment solutions for global users.
peaq serves as the leading Layer 1 for the decentralized physical infrastructure network sector by powering millions of real-world machines and autonomous devices.

Pharos Network is a high-performance EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain specifically engineered to scale the tokenization of Real-World Assets and bridge the gap between traditional finance and the decentralized economy. Built by a team of former leaders from Ant Group and Alibaba. the network utilizes a modular deep-parallel architecture—comprising L1-Base and L1-Core as well as L1-Extension layers—to achieve industry-leading speeds of up to 50k transactions per second with sub-second finality. Beyond performance Pharos integrates institutional-grade features such as zero-knowledge (ZK) based KYC/AML compliance and hardware-accelerated storage that reduces bloat by 80% as well as Special Processing Networks (SPNs) for tailored execution environments like decentralized AI and high-frequency trading.

Pi Network is a social cryptocurrency and developer platform as well as ecosystem designed for widespread accessibility and real-world utility. It enables users to mine and transact Pi using a mobile-friendly interface while supporting applications built within its blockchain ecosystem.

Picasso is a DeFi infrastructure Layer 1 protocol designed to solve cross-chain interoperability and security challenges. It extends the Inter-Blockchain Communication protocol to connect ecosystems like Solana Ethereum Cosmos and Polkadot. The network serves as a hub for secure asset transfers and introduces a generalized restaking layer to enhance blockchain security across multiple systems.
Plasma operates as a stablecoin-native blockchain infrastructure that offers true zero-fee transfers for USDT to facilitate everyday global spending and merchant payments.
Plume acts as a dedicated RWAfi network that integrates built-in compliance and automated tokenization engines to bring institutional yield products onto the blockchain.
Pocket Network provides decentralized RPC infrastructure by incentivizing a global network of nodes to provide reliable data access for thousands of different blockchains.

Pocket Network is a decentralized blockchain data platform that provides RPC access to various networks through a global group of nodes. It uses a proof of stake consensus mechanism to coordinate and incentivize node runners to provide high quality data relay services for decentralized applications.
The central coordination hub of the Polkadot network that is undergoing a massive "2026 Issuance Reduction" and "Dynamic Allocation Pool" upgrade to transition DOT into a deflationary model.
Polygon continues to evolve into a massive aggregated network of ZK-rollups that share liquidity and security through the unified AggLayer architecture.
Polygon zkEVM provides a zero-knowledge rollup environment for Ethereum smart contracts while transitioning its core focus toward the broader AggLayer architecture.

Polymesh is an institutional grade permissioned blockchain built specifically for regulated assets. It streamlines compliance processes and addresses gaps in security transparency and settlement to enable the creation and management of digital securities.
Primer is a modular Layer 1 blockchain and decentralized AI operating system providing scalable data availability and storage for high performance on-chain AI.
Provenance Blockchain acts as a leading ledger for the financial services industry to facilitate the seamless origination and exchange of tokenized real-world assets like mortgages.

Qtum is a decentralized hybrid blockchain that combines the security of Bitcoins UTXO model with the smart contract flexibility of the Ethereum Virtual Machine. It uses a proof of stake consensus mechanism to enable energy efficient transactions and features an Account Abstraction Layer to bridge the two architectures. The network supports on chain governance through its Decentralized Governance Protocol and aims to provide a scalable platform for decentralized applications and enterprise solutions.
Redbelly functions as a high-performance accountable blockchain designed for regulated financial markets and the trustless exchange of high-value real-world assets.

ReddCoin is a cryptocurrency that operates on its own decentralized blockchain and is designed for social payments and tipping as well as micro-transactions. The network enables fast and low-cost value transfers intended for everyday digital interactions. ReddCoin uses a Proof-of-Stake-Velocity PoSVconsensus mechanism which secures the network through staking while encouraging active participation. The blockchain produces blocks at regular intervals and has been operating continuously since its launch in 2014.
Ripple utilizes the XRP Ledger to provide institutional-grade liquidity solutions and real-time gross settlement for cross-border payments between major global banking institutions.

Ripple EVM is an Ethereum-compatible sidechain designed to bring smart contracts and decentralized finance (DeFi) capabilities to the XRP Ledger ecosystem by allowing developers to use familiar Ethereum tools while settling transactions via the XRP Ledger.

Robonomics is an open source platform for Internet of Things applications that connects user devices to the Polkadot and Ethereum ecosystems. It enables the exchange of technical and economic information between human-robot systems and digital services through decentralized protocols.
Ronin serves as a premier sidechain for the gaming industry that powers massive play-to-earn ecosystems while offering low-cost transactions and specialized NFT infrastructure.
Rootstock remains the premier Bitcoin sidechain that brings Ethereum-compatible smart contract functionality to the world’s most secure decentralized network.
Saga operates as a specialized Layer 1 protocol that allows developers to automatically spin up dedicated and parallelized blockchain environments called Chainlets for their applications.
Scroll maintains a bytecode-equivalent zero-knowledge rollup that ensures a seamless developer experience while inheriting the full security of Ethereum.

Secret Network is a privacy-focused layer-1 blockchain built on the Cosmos SDK that enables programmable privacy for smart contracts and decentralized applications. By utilizing Trusted Execution Environments and encryption the network ensures that smart contract inputs outputs and state remain confidential while maintaining a transparent underlying ledger. Powered by the SCRT utility token it supports secure use cases in finance gaming and artificial intelligence through interoperable confidential computing.
Sei remains a leading sector-specific Layer 1 blockchain that utilizes parallelized execution to provide ultra-fast trading infrastructure for decentralized exchanges and high-frequency finance.

Shape is a Layer 2 blockchain built on the Superchain and powered by the OP Stack designed specifically for creators to facilitate the discovery and distribution of digital culture. This network provides a scalable and cost effective environment for artists and innovators to build and interact with decentralized applications focused on creative expression.

Shibarium is a Layer 2 blockchain built on Ethereum designed to enhance the Shiba Inu ecosystem by providing faster transactions and significantly lower gas fees. It utilizes a Proof of Stake consensus mechanism and supports decentralized applications across DeFi gaming and NFTs while incorporating a burn mechanism to reduce SHIB supply.

Shiden Network is a multi chain decentralized application layer on the Kusama Network that supports Ethereum Virtual Machine and WebAssembly smart contracts. It serves as a research and development hub for the Astar ecosystem while providing a scalable platform for developers to build innovative cross chain solutions.
Shimmer serves as the staging network for the IOTA ecosystem that allows for the rapid deployment and testing of advanced smart contracts and tokenization features.

Signum brings a powerful blockchain solution to the world in the most sustainable way. Signum provides a digital currency called Signa that is distributed traded and stored using a decentralized ledger system. There are no intermediaries or payment gateways nor banks. But Signum is so much more than a digital currency. It has the power to feature unstoppable and censorship-resistant decentralized applications. Anyone can create digital assets that can be used in ways only limited by our imagination.
A sidechain for Bitcoin Cash designed to explore decentralized finance by providing an EVM-compatible environment that uses $BCH as its native gas token.
Solana continues to dominate the high-throughput blockchain sector by supporting a massive ecosystem of decentralized physical infrastructure and consumer-facing mobile applications.

Sologenic is a decentralized ecosystem built on the XRP Ledger that facilitates the investing and trading of tokenized assets including stocks and ETFs alongside cryptocurrencies. It utilizes its native SOLO token for liquidity and provides a high performance decentralized exchange for seamless asset integration.
Somnia provides a high-performance Layer 1 architecture specifically optimized for real-time metaverse experiences and large-scale social interactions involving millions of concurrent users.
Soneium is the official Sony Block Solutions Labs Layer 2 designed to bridge mainstream entertainment and gaming audiences into the Web3 world.
Songbird Canary-Network acts as the live testing environment for the Flare ecosystem where new governance features and oracle protocols undergo rigorous real-world stress testing.
Sonic represents the high-performance evolution of the Fantom network capable of achieving ten thousand transactions per second with sub-second finality through its new virtual machine.
Sophon functions as a modular entertainment-focused chain built on the ZK Stack to offer users a seamless lifestyle experience through gamified payments and identity.
Stable refers to an emerging class of institutional blockchains focused specifically on the regulated issuance and high-velocity movement of fiat-backed stablecoins and deposit tokens.

A Bitcoin Layer 2 solution that enables smart contracts and decentralized applications to settle on the Bitcoin blockchain. It utilizes a Proof of Transfer consensus mechanism to leverage Bitcoins security while providing scalability and functionality for DeFi and NFTs.

Starknet is a decentralized Validity-Rollup that operates as an Ethereum Layer 2 network. It uses ZK-STARK technology to provide high scalability and low transaction costs while maintaining Ethereum security.

Steem is a social-first Layer 1 blockchain designed for decentralized content sharing and social media applications. It uses a Delegated Proof-of-Stake consensus mechanism with witnesses to provide three-second block times and zero transaction fees. The ecosystem features three native tokens including STEEM and Steem Power plus the Steem Dollar stablecoin to reward creators and curators.
Stellar remains a leading global payment rail that is currently integrating advanced zero-knowledge privacy features to support regulated institutional financial flows and remittances.

Story is a Layer 1 blockchain designed as an IP World Layer to tokenize and manage intellectual property. It enables creators to register their work as programmable assets for licensing and monetization.

Stride is a specialized Layer 1 blockchain within the Cosmos ecosystem dedicated to liquid staking. It allows users to stake their assets from various IBC compatible chains to earn rewards while receiving liquid tokens for use in decentralized finance applications.
Sui utilizes an object-centric data model and parallel transaction processing to deliver a highly scalable environment for decentralized gaming and real-time asset management.
TAC Protocol acts as a dedicated EVM-compatible transition layer that connects the mature Ethereum decentralized finance ecosystem directly into the massive Telegram user base.
Telos EVM provides a high-performance smart contract environment featuring half-second block times and a robust privacy layer designed for scalable decentralized applications.
Tempo is a purpose-built L1 blockchain for payments and developed in partnership with leading fintechs and Fortune 500s. Tempo enables high-throughput low-cost global transactions for any use case.
Terra 2.0 functions as a community-led ecosystem focused on decentralized application migration and governance rebuilding following the original protocol collapse.

Terra 2.0 is a decentralized open-source public blockchain protocol launched in May 2022 following the collapse of the original Terra ecosystem and its algorithmic stablecoin. This community-governed network operates as a Layer 1 platform built with the Cosmos SDK and focuses on decentralized applications and staking without using any stablecoin mechanism. The native token LUNA is used for network security through staking and grants holders voting rights to direct the future of the ecosystem.
Terra Classic maintains a highly active community-driven network that implements frequent token burns and software upgrades to manage its hyperinflationary legacy supply.
Tezos successfully activated the Tallinn protocol upgrade in early 2026 to reduce block times to six seconds while significantly lowering storage costs for developers.

Theta Network is a decentralized blockchain platform designed for video streaming AI computing and media applications by leveraging a global peer-to-peer network of user-shared resources. It utilizes a dual-layer architecture consisting of the Theta Blockchain for governance and staking and the Theta Edge Network for distributed storage and computing power. The ecosystem operates on a two-token economy where THETA is used for network security and TFUEL serves as the operational fuel for transactions and rewards.
THORChain functions as a decentralized liquidity protocol that enables native asset swaps across different blockchains without the need for wrapped tokens or central intermediaries.
TokenEX operates as a specialized enterprise platform focused on the secure tokenization of sensitive payment data and compliance management for large-scale financial institutions.
The Open Network leverages its deep integration with Telegram to onboard millions of mainstream users into a sharded blockchain ecosystem for payments and decentralized storage.
TRON remains a dominant global settlement layer for stablecoins while recently upgrading its protocol to support advanced artificial intelligence and decentralized infrastructure integrations.
TX is a decentralized blockchain network designed to provide high-speed transactions and scalable infrastructure for decentralized applications and digital assets.
Unichain is a DeFi-native blockchain built by Uniswap Labs to provide sub-second swap speeds and optimized liquidity across multiple chains.

Vaulta is a high performance Layer 1 blockchain designed to provide decentralized infrastructure for data storage and artificial intelligence applications. It utilizes a modular architecture to ensure scalability and security for on chain data processing.
Velas utilizes a hybrid consensus mechanism combining Proof of Stake with Proof of History to deliver an ultra-fast and carbon-neutral smart contract platform.
Viction operates as a community-centric blockchain that incentivizes meaningful on-chain participation through its recurring Retrodrop programs and decentralized governance model.
WEMIX functions as a global gaming-focused blockchain ecosystem that integrates native stablecoin support to power sophisticated play-and-earn economies for major studio titles.

Wirex Pay Mainnet is a decentralized payment network built on a ZK-powered Layer 2 infrastructure designed to integrate traditional finance with blockchain technology. It enables non-custodial transactions and seamless crypto spending through a global card network.
Worldchain operates as an identity-focused network that prioritizes verified human users over automated bots to ensure fair access to blockspace.
WorldMobile Chain utilizes a decentralized physical infrastructure network to provide global telecommunications connectivity through a sharing economy powered by AirNodes.
X Layer is a ZK powered Layer 2 network developed by OKX using the Polygon CDK. It bridges the OKX exchange ecosystem with Ethereum to facilitate global on chain participation and scalability.

Xai Chain is the first Layer 3 blockchain in the Arbitrum ecosystem specifically designed to enable real economies and open trade in next generation video games. It allows traditional gamers to own and trade valuable in-game items without needing to interact with crypto wallets while offering a decentralized network for high-performance gaming applications.
XDB Chain operates as a high-speed protocol optimized for the consumer points economy to bridge traditional brand loyalty programs with decentralized blockchain assets.
XDC Network functions as an enterprise-grade Layer 1 specifically designed to bridge the global trade finance gap through the compliant tokenization of real-world assets.
Xion represents the first Layer 1 blockchain built for mainstream consumer adoption by utilizing generalized abstraction to remove the complexities of wallets and gas fees.
Zcash is navigating a post-halving landscape in 2026 with a focus on scaling shielded transaction volume through the implementation of the new Ztarknet layer.
Zenith operates as a cross-chain interoperability network designed to facilitate the seamless transfer of digital assets and cross-border payments between different blockchain ecosystems.
Zigchain functions as a specialized Cosmos-based network that has secured major institutional partnerships to tokenize over 300 million dollars in real-world sports and entertainment assets.
Zilliqa EVM has transitioned to a full Proof of Stake model following a major 2026 hard fork that aligns the network with modern Ethereum Virtual Machine standards.
Zircuit integrates artificial intelligence directly into its sequencer level to provide enhanced security and proactive protection against malicious on-chain transactions.

ZkCloud is a privacy focused blockchain network utilizing zero knowledge proofs to enable secure and scalable decentralized applications. It provides a robust infrastructure for developers to build confidential smart contracts and maintain user anonymity within its ecosystem.

ZKsync is a Layer 2 scaling solution for Ethereum that uses zero-knowledge rollup technology to provide low costs and high security. It aims to scale Ethereum while maintaining decentralization and user privacy through efficient cryptographic proofs.

Zora is a decentralized Layer 2 network built on the OP Stack that focuses on the creator economy by enabling the tokenization of media and social engagement. The protocol allows users to mint NFTs and transform posts into tradable content coins to facilitate direct monetization and onchain ownership. By providing low cost infrastructure and protocol level incentives Zora empowers artists to capture value from their work through secondary sales and referral rewards.
